intro_1: My name is Daniel Márquez. I started by running Moodle campuses and automating their workflows, moved through Odoo, and now I'm a backend developer working at the intersection of renewable energy and cloud infrastructure.
intro_2: At Full&Fast I'm building a serverless dimensioning engine for solar PV and battery-storage installations on AWS Lambda. Vectorizing the numerical models with NumPy is what keeps the whole calculation inside API Gateway's 29-second window.
intro_3: In parallel I maintain and extend OpositaTCAE, a platform for healthcare professionals with a Go backend,
descripcion_big: I manage and evolve Moodle platforms and custom streaming apps, layering FastAPI services, PostgreSQL analytics, and Dockerised deployments on AWS.
descripcion_consultor_moodle: I enable your platform to offer FUNDAE courses by adding reports with all the data they request. I also maintain your campuses (enable the cron, enable messaging, etc.). I can also create custom applications so you can maintain your brand image.
from: from Ourense, Spain. I build backend systems at the intersection of renewable energy and cloud infrastructure, with Python, Go, and AWS serverless.
mytasks_description: Application to save tasks, with login and crud to an encrypted postgres database.
amazon_description: Amazon Clone using Asp.Net Core MVC and Razor Pages. Customer profile can only purchase and review their cart and purchase history. Admin can create/modify/delete products and review all transaction and cart history. Microsoft SQL Server Database.
bigtv_description: Video streaming service. Videos are uploaded to a NAS which is accessed through a backend made in PHP with MySQL. This backend is accessed through two applications, one made for TV and another made for mobile.
turismovalencia_desc: Moodle-based tourism campus hosted on AWS with custom branding, on-demand video content, and automated deployments.
crou_desc: Province-wide Moodle campus with whitelabel mobile apps, AWS infrastructure, and streaming content delivered through signed links.
titulo_web: DaniMarqz's Portfolio - Web Developer and Programmer
descripcion_web: Hire DaniMarqz to create your web or mobile application. Web developer with extensive experience in databases.
description_saec_data: Development and configuration of Odoo modules with Python, PostgreSQL, XML, and JavaScript, plus reports and invoices with JasperReports. Introduced a self-hosted CI/CD pipeline with Gitea and containerized the codebase with Docker, shipping it as a single versioned image rather than loose module folders, for reproducible builds and reliable production deployments.
description_freelance: I design and operate end-to-end learning platforms. Highlight: OpositaTCAE — an Astro + Preact frontend and a Go backend on Docker, with a serverless AI service (AWS Lambda + Bedrock) that turns PDFs into Excel and several custom Moodle plugins, including one that serves protected video from S3 via CloudFront signed URLs, rewriting the .m3u8 manifest.
description_big_formacion: Managed Moodle and custom video streaming products, containerising services with Docker and orchestrating deployments on AWS (EC2, S3, CloudFront) while improving observability.
opositatcae_desc: End-to-end platform for healthcare-exam prep: an Astro + Preact frontend and a Go backend, with custom Moodle plugins (the main one serves HLS video from S3 via CloudFront signed URLs and an .m3u8-rewriting proxy), a serverless AWS Bedrock service that converts PDFs to Excel, and Redis for caching and rate limiting.
mytasks: Application to save notes, with login and backend with crud to an encrypted postgres database.
flutter: Mobile application using Flutter to save notes, books read, manage expenses and investments with login and crud to supabase.
quizreport: Moodle plugin that orchestrates FastAPI services via webhooks to stream quiz data and launch Pandas dashboards in real time.
quiz_analysis: FastAPI and Pandas service crunching Moodle quiz attempts in real time, persisting aggregates on PostgreSQL inside Dockerized workloads.
quiz_percentile: Analytics module that exposes percentile insights from PostgreSQL through FastAPI endpoints and renders custom charts for learners.
intro_1_5: I enjoy the full arc of a feature: from the data model to the AWS infrastructure.
intro_3_1: from Moodle integrations to AI-powered document processing on AWS Bedrock.
intro_3_2: I like debugging the edge cases and leaving the codebase better than I found it.
oposita_simulator: Source for the OpositaTCAE simulator: a Go backend (worker pools for emails, Moodle sync, and streaming Excel import) and an Astro + Preact frontend, on PostgreSQL and Redis, deployed on AWS.
description_full_and_fast: Building a serverless computation engine on AWS for the renewable energy sector, covering the full delivery cycle: data modeling, numerical computation with Python and NumPy, and infrastructure as code with AWS SAM. Working closely with domain experts to translate complex engineering requirements into clean, maintainable backend solutions on DynamoDB and AWS Lambda.
